channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AIADMK Leader Clarifies DMK's Role Amid Political Tensions in Tamil Nadu
item.description: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami addressed media in Salem, clarifying his party's stance against the DMK, calling it an 'evil force'. His remarks come after allegations that DMK and AI...

item.title: Trump settles $5.6m sexual abuse case with E Jean Carroll
item.description: President Donald Trump has transferred over $5.6 million to E Jean Carroll, a magazine writer, to settle a legal case where a jury found him liable for sexual abuse and defamation. The payment, made o...

item.title: Supreme Court Justice Alito's Potential Retirement Impact on Midterm Elections
item.description: The article analyzes the potential risk of Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito using an unconventional retirement announcement to influence the outcome of the upcoming midterm elections. Political anal...

item.title: EACC Lists 25 Corruption Cases in Kenya's Anti-Corruption Courts
item.description: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) has released a list of 25 corruption cases set to be heard in courts across Kenya between July 13-17. The cases involve senior officials, former govern...

item.title: Therapy Dogs Provide Emotional Support for Vulnerable South Africans
item.description: Therapy dogs like Toffee Beanz play a crucial role in supporting children and vulnerable individuals in South Africa. These animals offer a calming presence during trauma therapy and emotionally chall...

item.title: Phu Quoc Officials Address Rescue Efforts and Investigation into Vietnam Boat Tragedy
item.description: A speedboat carrying 32 Indian tourists and four Vietnamese crew members capsized near Phu Quoc on July 11, 2026, resulting in 15 deaths. The Phu Quoc chief denied allegations of delayed rescue, stati...

item.title: Kyra Cooney-Cross mourns loss of mother after her passing
item.description: Australian soccer star Kyra Cooney-Cross has shared an emotional tribute to her late mother, describing the loss as her 'biggest fear.' The Matildas midfielder, 24, announced her mother's passing on s...

item.title: Prosecution argues defense's nitpicking undermines impeachment case against Sara Duterte
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its fifth day with the prosecution accusing the defense team of focusing on minor document discrepancies rather than addressing the core al...

item.title: Zulu Traditional Prime Minister Replaced Following Dispute Over Ingonyama Trust Management
item.description: King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has dismissed Reverend Thulasizwe Buthelezi as Traditional Prime Minister of the Zulu nation for the second time, replacing him with Inkosi Phathisizwe Chiliza. The decision...

item.title: DPM Dar reaffirms Pakistan’s commitment to Saarc during meeting with Secretary-General Sarwar
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar emphasized Pakistan's steadfast support for the South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (Saarc) during a meeting with its Secretary-Genera...

item.title: Netflix Thriller 'The Whisper Man' Stars Adam Scott and Michelle Monaghan, Set for August 28 Release
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming Netflix thriller 'The Whisper Man,' based on Alex North's novel. The film follows a widowed crime writer, Tom Kennedy (played by Adam Scott), whose eight-year-old so...

item.title: Tanzanian Billionaire Considers Investment in Dangote's East African Refinery Project
item.description: Tanzanian billionaire Mohammed Dewji has shown interest in investing $100 million in a $17 billion crude oil refinery project planned for East Africa. The project, led by Africa's richest person Aliko...

item.title: Burkina Faso and France Sever Diplomatic Ties Amid Sahel's Shift Toward Russia
item.description: Burkina Faso has severed diplomatic relations with France, marking a significant shift in regional dynamics. This decision follows nearly three years of deteriorating ties since Captain Ibrahim Traoré...

item.title: Zazzau Emir Urges Community Support for Education Access
item.description: The Emir of Zazzau, Mallam Ahmed Nuhu Bamalli, has called on wealthy individuals and philanthropists to support children from less privileged families by covering school fees, ensuring they have acces...

item.title: Toddler Abandoned Near Highway, Good Samaritan Saves Child
item.description: A toddler was found wandering near a busy highway in Chogoria after his mother allegedly abandoned him. Residents reported the incident around 8 pm when a woman was seen talking on her phone for a lon...

item.title: Zulu King Replaces Prime Minister After Second Sacking
item.description: Embattled Zulu King Misuzulu kaZwelithini has relieved Thulasizwe Buthelezi of his role as traditional prime minister for the second time, appointing Inkosi Phathisizwe Chiliza in his place. The decis...

item.title: Saskatchewan Minister Addresses Inmate Release Errors and Systemic Concerns
item.description: Saskatchewan’s community safety minister, Michael Weger, has defended the province’s corrections system amid criticism over the wrongful release of five inmates in 2026. The errors, attributed to admi...

item.title: Tragic accident claims life of young boy in Quebec town
item.description: A five-year-old boy has tragically lost his life after being hit by a heavy truck in Carleton-sur-Mer, Quebec’s Gaspé region. Provincial police spokesperson Frédéric Deshaies confirmed the incident oc...

item.title: Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co Celebrate Marriage
item.description: Bea Alonzo, a renowned Filipino actress and businesswoman known for her roles in Philippine television, has recently tied the knot with Vincent Co, a prominent figure at Puregold, a leading insurance ...

item.title: New York imposes one-year data center moratorium amid environmental concerns
item.description: New York Governor Kathy Hochul has announced a one-year moratorium on constructing large new data centers, positioning the state as a leader in addressing the environmental and economic impacts of AI ...
